articles.title: Samsung Results Trigger Stock Rotation to Less Loved Sectors - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Asian tech stocks slumped, as investors used Samsung Electronics Co.’s results to lock in profits on a stellar year-to-date chip rally, rotating into unloved sectors less prone to earnings shocks.

articles.title: In-N-Out unveils 6 new locations across 5 states. See where - USA Today
articles.description: The iconic company has grown beyond its California roots in recent years, opening locations in Colorado, Texas, Idaho, and as far east as Tennessee.

articles.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom - TechCrunch
articles.description: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.

articles.description: President Donald Trump claimed on Truth Social that Walmart summer price cuts were initiated at his administration's request to celebrate the country's 250th birthday.

articles.title: Toyota to invest $3.6 billion to move Tacoma pickup truck production from Mexico to Texas - CNBC
articles.description: Toyota said it is investing $3.6 billion to move production of the Tacoma midsize pickup truck from Mexico to its San Antonio manufacturing campus in Texas.

articles.title: Breaking: Vertex makes $10B deal for commercial endocrinology biotech Crinetics - Endpoints News
articles.description: Vertex Pharmaceuticals acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10B ($85/share), gaining acromegaly drug Palsonify and endocrinology pipeline with ~$5B peak sales potential.
